creator: ports@geeksrus.net
text:
This is a free Python book "for experienced programmers." It is also
available in several translations, and in a variety of formats. This
port includes the single-file HTML version plus the supporting Python
code files.

Fix: 

Pete, please look over the attached port for my use of DOCSDIR and the
PLIST_SUBS entry I used. I believe this is appropriate for general use
per our other discussion.

N.B. I'm using the -a option to send-pr, so if the shar file is
missing, I'll add it in a reply.
